mapper.select:
SELECT /* [SaleMng_SQL.xml][selectSaleMngList] */ AAA.RNUM, AAA.NEW_RNUM, AAA.SALE_DATE, AAA.SALE_SITE, AAA.SALE_ITEM, AAA.SALE_AMT, AAA.SALE_MANAGER, AAA.SALE_REG_DATE FROM ( SELECT AA.RNUM , ROWNUM AS NEW_RNUM , AA.SALE_DATE, AA.SALE_SITE, AA.SALE_ITEM, AA.SALE_AMT, AA.SALE_MANAGER, AA.SALE_REG_DATE FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM RNUM , TO_CHAR(A.SALE_DATE , 'MM/DD/YYYY') AS SALE_DATE, A.SALE_SITE, A.SALE_ITEM, A.SALE_AMT, A.SALE_MANAGER, TO_CHAR(A.SALE_REG_DATE , 'MM/DD/YYYY') AS SALE_REG_DATE FROM SALE_MNG A WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY A.SALE_REG_DATE DESC , RNUM DESC ) AA WHERE 1 = 1
AND AA.SALE_DATE LIKE '%' || #{saleDate} || '%'
AND AA.SALE_SITE LIKE '%' || #{saleSite} || '%'
AND AA.SALE_ITEM LIKE '%' || #{saleItem} || '%'
AND AA.SALE_AMT LIKE '%' || #{saleAmt} || '%'
AND AA.SALE_MANAGER LIKE '%' || #{saleManager} || '%'
AND AA.SALE_REG_DATE LIKE '%' || #{saleRegDate} || '%'
) AAA WHERE 1 = 1
AND AAA.NEW_RNUM > #{totCntPerPage} * (#{currPage}-1)
AND AAA.NEW_RNUM <= #{totCntPerPage} * #{currPage}
ORDER BY AAA.NEW_RNUM ASC

SELECT /* [SaleMng_SQL.xml][selectSaleMngListTotcnt] */ COUNT(*) AS totcnt FROM ( SELECT RNUM , ROWNUM AS NEW_RNUM , AA.SALE_DATE, AA.SALE_SITE, AA.SALE_ITEM, AA.SALE_AMT, AA.SALE_MANAGER, AA.SALE_REG_DATE FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM RNUM , TO_CHAR(A.SALE_DATE , 'MM/DD/YYYY') AS SALE_DATE, A.SALE_SITE, A.SALE_ITEM, A.SALE_AMT, A.SALE_MANAGER, TO_CHAR(A.SALE_REG_DATE , 'MM/DD/YYYY') AS SALE_REG_DATE FROM SALE_MNG A ORDER BY A.SALE_REG_DATE DESC ) AA WHERE 1 = 1
AND SALE_DATE LIKE '%' || #{saleDate} || '%'
AND SALE_SITE LIKE '%' || #{saleSite} || '%'
AND SALE_ITEM LIKE '%' || #{saleItem} || '%'
AND SALE_AMT LIKE '%' || #{saleAmt} || '%'
AND SALE_MANAGER LIKE '%' || #{saleManager} || '%'
AND SALE_REG_DATE LIKE '%' || #{saleRegDate} || '%'
) AAA
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO /* [SaleMng_SQL.xml][insertSaleMng] */ SALE_MNG ( SALE_DATE, SALE_SITE, SALE_ITEM, SALE_AMT, SALE_MANAGER, SALE_REG_DATE ) VALUES ( TO_DATE(REPLACE(#{saleDate} , '/','') , 'MM/DD/YYYY'), #{saleSite}, #{saleItem}, #{saleAmt}, #{saleManager}, TO_DATE(REPLACE(#{saleRegDate} , '/','') , 'MM/DD/YYYY') )
